__schema0.description: The unique identifier of the trained model.

__schema1.description: The definition part number. When the definition is loaded for inference the definition parts are streamed in the order of their part number. The first part must be `0` and the final part must be `total_parts - 1`.

__schema2.description: The definition part for the model. Must be a base64 encoded string.

__schema3.description: The total uncompressed definition length in bytes. Not base64 encoded.

__schema4.description: The total number of parts that will be uploaded. Must be greater than 0.
